blended.narrative: Grouse Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 48 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 8" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
